pattern: Walking a monotonic stack over the array traversed twice resolves the next greater element with wraparound for a circular array.
hints: The array is circular, so an element's next greater may lie after wrapping past the end.
Simulating two passes over the indices covers every circular position once.
Iterate index i from 0 to 2n-1 using i % n; while the stack's top value is smaller than the current value, set its answer and pop, pushing indices only during the first pass.

edge_inputs.description: all equal values yield all minus one
strictly decreasing wraps to find the max

stress.description: random circular array with duplicates and negatives
stress.generator_python:
def gen(rng, size):
    n = max(1, min(10000, size))
    nums = [rng.randint(-1000, 1000) for _ in range(n)]
    return [nums]
